name: Thornhill
description: '''Thornhill''' are an Australian [[heavy metal music|heavy metal]] band from [[Melbourne]], formed in 2015. Their style is primarily described as [[alternative metal]] and [[metalcore]]. The band currently consists of vocalist Jacob Charlton, guitarist Ethan McCann, drummer Ben Maida, and bass guitarist Nick Sjogren. Thornhill have released three studio albums: ''[[The Dark Pool]]'' (2019), ''[[Heroine (Thornhill album)|Heroine]]'' (2022) and ''[[Bodies (Thornhill album)|Bodies]]'' (2025), and two EPs: ''13'' (2016) and ''Butterfly'' (2018).
